article_title: UK Competition Authority Launches Formal Investigation Into Microsoft's Business Software Empire, Targeting Cloud Licensing and AI Bundling

content_preview.title: UK Competition Authority Launches Formal Investigation Into Microsoft's Business Software Empire, Targeting Cloud Licensing and AI Bundling
content_preview.summary: The CMA will begin a Strategic Market Status investigation in May, examining whether Microsoft's licensing practices disadvantage rival cloud providers and whether AI integration into productivity tools could entrench dominance.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

The United Kingdom's Competition and Markets Authority announced on March 31, 2026 that it will launch a Strategic Market Status (SMS) investigation into Microsoft's business software ecosystem, according to the [CMA's official announcement](https://www.gov.uk/government/news/cma-announces-package-of-actions-on-business-software-and-cloud-services).
